name_en: .🔥《With full set of original green box packaging》🔥【New】This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, featuring double rings and a rectangular design, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with glossy leather, and can also be easily worn on the shoulder or crossbody.
name_cn:
.🔥《With full set of original green box packaging》🔥【New】This Gucci Horsebit 1955 series small shoulder bag continues the equestrian style, featuring double rings and a rectangular design, cleverly blending light gold-tone details with glossy leather, and can also be easily worn on the shoulder or crossbody.
Black glossy leather
Light gold-tone hardware
Brown cotton-linen blend lining
Front detail: Horsebit
Interior: 1 open pocket
Handle height: 4cm
Removable leather shoulder strap (drop 47cm - 55cm); length adjustable from 95cm to 110cm
Spring clip closure
Model: 815206
Dimensions: 22.5cm (W) x 12.5cm (H) x 5.5cm (D)
Weight: approx. 0.45kg
Color: Black full grain/Original leather.
Made in Italy
